description: You are an ESL instructor preparing a 'shadowing' practice exercise. Extract the audio for the 5 phrases specified in /home/ga/Videos/esl_materials/dialogue_timestamps.txt from the source video at /home/ga/Videos/esl_materials/restaurant_dialogue.mp4. Slow the playback speed of each phrase to exactly 80% (0.8x) while preserving the original vocal pitch. Save the processed phrases as phrase_01.mp3 through phrase_05.mp3 in /home/ga/Music/shadowing_package/. Create an M3U playlist named shadowing_practice.m3u in the same directory that interleaves the 5 phrases with the silence track at /home/ga/Videos/esl_materials/silence_3s.mp3 in the following order: phrase 1, silence, phrase 2, silence, phrase 3, silence, phrase 4, silence, phrase 5, silence. Use relative or absolute paths within the playlist.
